title: Decoding Environmental Contamination: Phage Ecogenomic Signatures as Next-Generation Tools for Microbial Source Tracking
description: An in-depth review of using bacteriophage ecogenomic signatures and metagenomic analysis for high-resolution microbial source tracking and environmental risk assessment.
topic: Microbial Source Tracking and Phage Genomics
audience: Researchers, scientists, and drug development professionals
